text.heading: APPLICATION FOR SABBATICAL LEAVE
text.p: I hereby wish to apply for a one-year sabbatical leave to be spent as a visiting Lecturer in the Department of Economics, College of Management and Social Sciences, Osun State University, Okuku Campus.

I approached the Registrar, Osun State University, Osogbo, and the Registrar has offered me a Visiting Senior Lecturer Appointment in the Department of Economics, College of Management and Social Sciences (Okuku Campus). The commencement date of the sabbatical leave is March 1, 2010. I hope to return back to duty on February 28, 2011 (see attached Offer of Sabbatical Appointment from the Uni-Osun Registrar).

Since my appointment as a Graduate Assistant in the Department of Economics, fifteen years ago (June 1995), I have been consistently on ground. For this and other sundry reasons, I implore your good office to grant me the sabbatical leave as requested.
Thank you for your anticipated support.
